articles.title: Trading for Elias Pettersson might be a risk worth taking for Bruins
articles.description:
If the Bruins are willing to roll the dice, Elias Pettersson is a potential top-line center operating at low value.

articles.title: Celtics lose out on Giannis sweepstakes as Bucks trade star to Miami
articles.description:
The Celtics reportedly offered up Jaylen Brown and two first-round picks as part of their offer to the Bucks.

articles.title: Jake McCarthy hits 3-run triple as Rockies rally in 9th for 3-2 win over Red Sox
articles.description:
The Rockies started the inning with three straight singles off All-Star closer Aroldis Chapman (0-3) before McCarthy sent a liner that hit off the wall and bounded away from left fielder Jarren Duran.

The post Jake McCarthy hits 3-run triple as Rockies rally in 9th for 3-2 win over Red Sox appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: Rafael Devers’ disastrous tenure with Giants hits new low with pinch-hit drama
articles.description:
Devers initially refused to leave Sunday's game after getting replaced with a pinch runner in the ninth inning.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown on Celtics trade rumors: ‘You’re turning me into a monster’
articles.description:

articles.title: Patrice Bergeron elected to Hockey Hall of Fame in 1st year on ballot
